data.body: Live-run progress (live-run authorized). VALIDATED live: (1) DELETE-PERMISSION probe — the credential IS delete-scoped: REB-877 hard-deleted cleanly via acli (GET->404); a client.create_issue+delete_issue round-trip (REB-879) confirmed no leak (GET->404). FINDING for the matrix: create+IMMEDIATE-delete races on Jira eventual consistency — acli's delete emits a confusing 'Issue does not exist' false-failure (AcliMutationError, NOT a 403 PermissionError) when the just-created issue isn't yet index-visible; live scenarios must add a create->visible settle/poll before mutating. (2) Several matrix behaviors were validated IN PASSING during the a118 live rollout on live REB: create+sync (synthetic local -> REB issue with rebar-id label + local_id entity property), TERMINAL_TRANSITION heal (binding_walk drift-class-A, breaker-capped 1/854), delete (permission-scoped), and IDEMPOTENCY-convergence (30 consecutive reconcile-bridge shadow passes all divergent=0 = the reconciler converges to no-change over unchanged data). Leak sweep: CLEAN, zero surviving test artifacts. REMAINING live matrix (focused live-run, multi-pass, needs eventual-consistency + lock-coordination handling): C1 conflict signal, C2 hard-delete->re-create (exercises 9622 write-ahead recovery, ~grace+1 passes), C3 field-drop alert, C4 429/jittered-backoff, echo suppression, full status round-trip w/ lossy labels (N=3), full tombstone/grace, scoped idempotency (mutation_count==0) + JSON report + ADR.
